query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_febraban,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.nrOperacao IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pagos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.nrOperacao IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_pagos
FROM febraban f
LEFT JOIN consignados c ON TRIM(f.proposta) = TRIM(c.nrOperacao);
